title: Love Is a Battlefield
why_this_song: Love Is a Battlefield by Pat Benatar (1983) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 10 times; first heard in: "We are young (heartache to heartache)"
Appears 8 times; first heard in: "(Love is a battlefield) love is a battlefield"
Appears 6 times; first heard in: "(We are young, we are young)"
Appears 6 times; first heard in: "Heartache to heartache we stand (we stand)"
Appears 5 times; first heard in: "(No promises) no promises, (no demands) no demands"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: You're beggin' me to go, then makin' me stay
Why do you hurt me so bad?
It would help me to know, do I stand in your way

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "heartache" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "heartache" na música inteira?

excerpts.text: Searchin' our hearts for so long
No one can tell us we're wrong

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "Love Is a Battlefield" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "Love Is a Battlefield" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?

exercises.prompt_en: Who in your life would you dedicate "Love Is a Battlefield" to, and what line captures what you want to say to them?
exercises.prompt_pt: Para quem da sua vida você dedicaria "Love Is a Battlefield", e qual verso resume o que você quer dizer para essa pessoa?

exercises.prompt_en: Compare "Love Is a Battlefield" with a Brazilian song you know. Do they share a theme? How do their styles differ?
exercises.prompt_pt: Compare "Love Is a Battlefield" com alguma música brasileira que você conhece. Elas compartilham algum tema? Como os estilos diferem?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
